ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_HEART.title: Heart of the Phoenix
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_HEART.descript: The first time you play a Power each turn, gain [green]{RegenPower}[/green] [gold]Regen[/gold].
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_TALON.title: PhoenixTalon
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_TALON.descript: When you play an Attack, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP and gain [green]{StrengthPower}[/green] Strength.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_FEATHER.title: PhoenixFeather
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_FEATHER.descri: Skills cost [blue]{Energy}[/blue] less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Whenever you play a Skill, lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP.
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_WRATH.title: PhoenixWrath
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_PRIDE.title: PhoenixPride
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_GREED.title: PhoenixGreed
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_GROWTH.title: Brazier of Rebirth
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-PHOENIX_GROWTH.descrip: The first time you would die in combat, heal to [green]{Heal}[/green] HP instead.
